picks.game: New York Yankees @ Boston Red Sox

He also boasts impressive splits against left-handed pitching, hitting over .400 with an over .800 slugging percentage, which is significant against Red Sox starter Payton Tolle. While Tolle has shown strikeout potential, he has also allowed 10 earned runs in his last three starts, and the Yankees lineup, despite some injuries, has high strikeout rates which could lead to more pitches seen and opportunities for Goldschmidt.
